item.lakescanner.scanner.tooltip: Scans documents, maps, photos, containers... and hands
item.lakescanner.pocket_multitool.toolti: Ender modem + speaker in one pocket upgrade
item.lakescanner.folder.tooltip: Holds 27 stacks of printouts and paper (16 per slot)
item.lakescanner.pen.tooltip: Hold a printed page in your other hand to draw on it
item.lakescanner.pen.needs_page: Hold a printed page in your other hand
item.lakescanner.stamp.tooltip: Use alone to design the emblem; use with a page to stamp it
item.lakescanner.stamp.blank: This stamp has no emblem yet -- use it with empty hands to design one
item.lakescanner.stamp.hint: Click to stamp -- shift-click to stamp repeatedly
